task_description: Complete premium redesign of the Music Search & Discovery application into an elegant, editorial-style music platform with black-and-white primary palette, luxurious typography, cinematic artwork presentation, glassmorphism effects, and smooth animations. Fix artist/album navigation to use in-app routes instead of external links.

verification.summary: Lint passes with 0 errors (2 pre-existing warnings in SearchFilters.tsx). Build succeeds with all 9 routes compiling. No test framework configured. Two semantic review passes conducted, all issues addressed.
